infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Status
infrastructure.body:
# Infrastructure Status

## Overall Health
**HEALTHY**

Monday 2026-03-09 — check #28 (22:02Z / 6:02 PM EDT). Extended hours active. All 10/10 collectors producing data. 8 large-cap/ETF with data through 21:45Z (extended hours flowing). ESTC ended at 20:00Z (normal). Broker operational. 6 active tasks evolving (0 errors). Portfolio empty — no live trading risk.

## Market Context
Monday 2026-03-09, 22:02Z (6:02 PM EDT). Post-DST. Market closed at 20:00Z. **Extended hours active** until ~00:00Z Tue.

**Latest prices (extended hours, 21:45Z bars):**
- GLD: $472.12
- SPY: $677.12
- QQQ: $606.80
- XLE: $55.86
- NVDA: $181.72
- AAPL: $259.32
- IWM: $253.40
- SLV: $78.64
- ESTC: $53.25 (last bar at 20:00Z — extended hours ended)

## Collectors
| ID | Type | Symbol | TF | Disabled | Data Fresh | Last Bar | Last Price | Priority | Notes |
|----|------|--------|----|----------|------------|----------|------------|----------|-------|
| `[[collector/e5125995]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/GLD]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | 21:45Z | $472.12 | **Critical** (3 tasks) | Extended hours flowing. |
| `[[collector/9c3ba4ef]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/XLE]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | 21:45Z | $55.86 | **Important** (1 task) | Extended hours flowing. |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/ESTC]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 20:00Z | 20:00Z | $53.25 | **Important** (2 tasks) | Extended hours ended 20:00Z (normal). |
| `[[collector/35cf414b]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/ESTC]]` | 15min | No | ✅ 20:00Z | 20:00Z | $53.25 | Low | Aggregation normal. |
| `[[collector/999b208d]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/SPY]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | 21:45Z | $677.12 | Low | Extended hours flowing. |
| `[[collector/9c417caa]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/QQQ]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | 21:45Z | $606.80 | Low | Extended hours flowing. |
| `[[collector/3d04a943]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/NVDA]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | 21:45Z | $181.72 | Low | Extended hours flowing. |
| `[[collector/c00fd831]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/AAPL]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | 21:45Z | $259.32 | Low | Extended hours flowing. |
| `[[collector/f60d4dce]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/IWM]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | 21:45Z | $253.40 | Low | Extended hours flowing. |
| `[[collector/2a8681ef]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/SLV]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | 21:45Z | $78.64 | Low | Extended hours flowing. |

**Summary:** 10/10 collectors enabled and producing. 8 large-cap/ETF: data through 21:45Z, extended hours flowing. ESTC: last bar 20:00Z (normal). Ingestion lag ~17 min (normal).

## Brokers
| ID | Name | Type | Status | Notes |
|----|------|------|--------|-------|
| `[[broker/alpaca-paper]]` (ed622468) | Alpaca Paper | alpaca | ✅ Healthy | paper-api.alpaca.markets, SIP data feed. Config verified. |

## Active Optimization Tasks (6)
| Task | Asset | Selection | Pop | best_fitness (22:02Z) | Change from 21:33Z | Errors | Status |
|------|-------|-----------|-----|----------------------|---------------------|--------|--------|
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` | GLD | spea2-rp | 200 | 0.6542 | −0.006 | 0 | Active (continued slight dip) |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` | GLD | spea2-rp | 200 | 0.6425 | −0.036 ⬇️ | 0 | Active (continued decline from 0.8264 peak) |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` | GLD | nsga3 | 200 | 0.2246 | −0.040 ⬇️ | 0 | Active (deeper EOL trough) |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` | ESTC | spea2-rp | 200 | 0.6302 | ≈0.000 | 0 | Active (stable) |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` | ESTC | nsga3 | 200 | 0.2271 | −0.029 ⬇️ | 0 | Active (dip) |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` | XLE | nsga3 | 200 | 0.2689 | +0.025 ⬆️ | 0 | Active (slight recovery) |

## Active Issues
| Component | Issue | Since | Impact | Action Taken |
|-----------|-------|-------|--------|--------------|
| — | No active issues | — | — | — |

## Resolved Issues (last 7 days)
| Component | Issue | Duration | Resolution |
|-----------|-------|----------|------------|
| Eval scheduler (GitHub #95) | Reported as stopped since Mar 7 02:15Z | Mar 7–9 (~2 days investigation) | Not broken. Evals only run on new bar data. Weekend gap expected. Closed. |
| ESTC collectors (ab739989, 35cf414b) | Fri pre-market data late | ~2h40m Fri 2026-03-07 | First bar at 11:40Z. Normal small-cap variation. |
| ESTC collectors (ab739989, 35cf414b) | No pre-market data — 4h gap | ~4h Wed 2026-03-04 | Self-recovered at 13:00Z. |
| ALL collectors (system-wide) | Data ingestion delayed after 14:15Z Mon 2026-03-02 | ~30 min | Self-recovered. Data delayed, not lost. |

## Watchpoints
- **Extended hours data** — verify collectors continue producing during extended hours (until ~00:00Z Tue). ESTC done at 20:00Z.
- **Eval resumption** — expect new evaluations ~02:15Z Tue using Monday data. Critical: `[[model/61694274]]`/`[[model/2704110c]]` Track B eval 4 of 5.
- **`[[task/b1936192]]` continued decline** — 0.8264→0.6782→0.6425. Cycling down. May surge again.
- **`[[task/32062f72]]` deeper trough** — 0.2646→0.2246. EOL cycling continues.
- **generation_rate metric** — returns null/0 for all tasks. Known anomaly.

model-rankings.title: Model Rankings
model-rankings.body:
# Model Rankings

## ⚠️ OPERATIONAL ALERT: Evaluation Gap

**Daily model evaluations have NOT run since Mar 7 02:15Z (Saturday).** Both Mar 8 (Sunday) and Mar 9 (Monday) batches are missing — a 2-day gap. All eval data below is from Mar 7 or earlier. Flagged to Operator (high priority).

## Ready for Promotion

*No models currently meet all promotion criteria (score >= 0.80, 5+ consecutive evals, backtest confirmed, IS DD < 15%).*

## Promotion Pipeline

### Track B — CLOSEST (3/5 consecutive >= 0.80) — `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 GLD

| Model | Eval Trajectory | Latest | IS DD | OOS BT | OOS DD | Ops | WR | cecpp | Risk |
|-------|----------------|--------|-------|--------|--------|-----|----|-------|------|
| `[[model/61694274]]` | 0.833 → 0.827 → **0.806** | **0.806** | **10.28%** (4.72% headroom) | **0.810** | 13.26% | 57 (46W/1L + 10 open) | 97.9% | 0.908 | Ops below 60-cliff. 1 loser appeared. Declining −0.013/eval. 0 closed trades in 30d. |
| `[[model/2704110c]]` | 0.833 → 0.827 → **0.806** | **0.806** | **10.28%** | — | 13.26% | 57 | 95.7% | 0.910 | Twin of 61694274. Identical trajectory. |

**Status:** STALLED by eval gap. Next eval (when system resumes) is make-or-break. Declining trend projects ~0.793 (below 0.80). Ops dropped to 57 — below EXP-10's 60-op minimum, increasing trade_count_factor penalty. If next eval < 0.80, consecutive count resets to 0/5.

### Track C — EXP-15 NSGA-III (1/5 consecutive >= 0.80) — `[[task/32062f72]]`

| Model | First Eval | IS Score | IS DD | OOS BT | OOS DD | Ops (IS/OOS) | IS WR | OOS WR | IS-OOS Gap | Status |
|-------|-----------|----------|-------|--------|--------|-------------|-------|--------|------------|--------|
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | **0.819** | 0.809 | **13.38%** (1.62% headroom) | **0.818** | **9.44%** | 430/44 | 72.6% | 97.3% | **1.2%** | BEST CANDIDATE. Least regime inflation ever. |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | **0.817** | 0.807 | **13.38%** (1.62% headroom) | **0.816** | **9.44%** | 432/43 | 72.3% | 97.2% | **1.2%** | Twin of 198d0c1f. Equally strong. |
| `[[model/4e87830e]]` | **0.820** | — | **14.83%** (0.17% headroom) | — | — | 352/45 | — | 100% | — | IS DD too tight — borderline blocked. |
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | **0.829** | — | **19.20%** | — | — | 228/40 | — | 100% | — | IS DD BLOCKS promotion. |

**Status:** STALLED by eval gap. 198d0c1f and 289705b1 need 4 more evals ≥0.80. Their 1.2% IS-OOS gap is unprecedented — NSGA-III diversity finds genuinely robust models. Recent 30d: 0 closed trades for 198d0c1f (same front-loading pattern). Earliest promotion ~Mar 14 (if evals resume immediately).

### Track A — RESET (0/5 consecutive) — `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 GLD

| Model | Eval History | Latest | IS DD | OOS BT | OOS DD | Recent 30d | Status |
|-------|-------------|--------|-------|--------|--------|------------|--------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | 0.711 → 0.649 → 0.782 → 0.738 → 0.805 → **0.798** | **0.798** | **14.03%** (0.97% headroom) | **0.799** | **3.77%** | 9 ops, 7W/1L, $149 | Reset to 0/5. Volatile ±0.05. **ONLY top model actively trading.** |

**Status:** Reset to 0/5 after dropping below 0.80. BEST OOS DD (3.77%), highest cecpp (0.968), and **only promotion candidate with recent closed trades** (7W/1L, $149 in 30 days). IS DD 14.03% gives only 0.97% headroom. If it stabilises above 0.80, needs 5 consecutive from scratch. Volatile trajectory makes this low probability.

### 54b33aea — Rising Candidate (1/1 evals ≥0.80, task disabled)

| Model | Eval | OOS BT | IS DD | OOS DD | Ops (IS/OOS/Recent) | IS WR | OOS WR | Recent WR | IS-OOS Gap | Status |
|-------|------|--------|-------|--------|---------------------|-------|--------|-----------|------------|--------|
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` | **0.811** | **0.829** | **13.38%** | **9.05%** | 244/64/25 | 66.7% | 92.7% | **60%** | 15.2% | **2nd most active trader.** Recent WR reverting to IS levels. |

**Status:** Upgraded to tracked candidate this cycle. BT score 0.829 significantly above daily eval 0.811. IS DD 13.38% (1.62% headroom). **Active trader: 9W/6L in recent 30d** ($77 profit) — 2nd most active after 7f7ac2e4. However, recent WR 60% matches IS WR 66.7%, suggesting the OOS premium is fading. IS-OOS gap 15.2% (higher regime inflation than 198d0c1f's 1.2%). Task disabled but evals continue.

## IS DD-Blocked (Score >= 0.80 but IS DD > 15%)

| Model | Task | Latest Score | Evals >= 0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | Block Margin | Notes |
|-------|------|-------------|---------------|-------|--------|-------------|-------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | **0.856** (RECORD) | 2/2 | **18.35%** | 4.04% | 3.35% over | Record score. 51W/0L. cecpp 0.974. Permanently blocked. |
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | **0.829** | 1 | **19.20%** | — | 4.20% over | Highest EXP-15 score but blocked. |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | **0.801** ↓ | 3/3 | **19.27%** | 9.44% | 4.27% over | 3 evals ≥0.80 but declining (0.833→0.816→0.801). WR dropped (100%→96.8%). Task disabled. |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | 0.773 ↓ | 0 | **15.25%** | 13.42% | 0.25% over | Declining (0.794→0.773). |

## Monitoring (Promising)

| Model | Task | Score | IS DD | OOS DD | Ops | Evals | Trend | Next Review |
|-------|------|-------|-------|--------|-----|-------|-------|-------------|
| `[[model/50b0d769]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.763 | **10.28%** | 13.03% | 55 | 3 | Flat/declining (0.763→0.776→0.763) | Next eval batch. WR declining (100%→93.3%). |
| `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | 0.738 | **9.76%** | 13.25% | ~39 | 4 | Volatile | Task disabled. |
| `[[model/c9647008]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.642 | **9.29%** | 13.36% | 85 | 2 | Declining (0.676→0.642) | Best IS DD headroom but low score. |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.693 | **9.64%** | **8.40%** | 58 | 6 | Volatile (0.491→0.630→0.702→0.693) | Best safety (lowest DD both IS & OOS). Can't reach 0.80. |
| `[[model/64a144a1]]` | `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 | 0.530 ↑ | 12.83% | — | 79 | 3 | **Rising** (0.504→0.514→0.530) | Best NSGA-III ESTC. Positive trajectory. |
| `[[model/19c1f02b]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | 0.793 | **19.36%** | — | 40 | 3 | Dropping from 0.811 | IS DD blocks. Task disabled. |
| `[[model/9802794d]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | 0.776 | ~19% | — | ~38 | 2 | Rising | IS DD blocks. Task disabled. |
| `[[model/4e87830e]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | **0.820** | **14.83%** | — | 352 | 1 | New (1st eval) | IS DD 0.17% headroom — too tight for safety. |

## Degrading (Action Needed)

| Model | Task | Score | Trend (last 5 evals) | Key Concern | Live? | Recommendation |
|-------|------|-------|---------------------|-------------|-------|----------------|
| `[[model/5c6aede0]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.709 | Window artifacts, ops declining | Dying — cecpp falling | No | DYING. |
| `[[model/6bd6b1c2]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.721 | Bouncing around 0.72 | OOS DD 16.18% breached | No | DEAD. |
| `[[model/33e3f843]]` | `[[task/826092ce]]` EXP-2 | 0.641 | Bounced (window artifact) | Task disabled. Formally demoted. | No | DEMOTED. |
| `[[model/66806842]]` | `[[task/c6edbe72]]` EXP-5 | 0.607 | Oscillating 0.57-0.61 | Task DISABLED Mar 9. | No | Monitoring only. |

## XLE / New Instruments (Very Early)

| Model | Task | Score | Created | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|---------|-------|
| `[[model/4376d5b3]]` 🆕 | `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 XLE | **0.293** | Mar 9 17:03Z | **NEW this cycle.** 3rd XLE model. Best XLE score so far. |
| `[[model/b6332f55]]` | `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 XLE | 0.202 | Mar 9 11:46Z | |
| `[[model/54afae21]]` | `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 XLE | 0.177 | Mar 9 09:54Z | |

## Failed / Not Ready

| Category | Models | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| NSGA-III ESTC (low) | `[[model/f1df6a17]]` (0.317), `[[model/8b53300f]]` (0.244) | Stable but far from threshold. |
| EXP-10 GLD (failing) | `[[model/d314d811]]` (0.582), `[[model/5aedf294]]` (0.431), `[[model/73701688]]` (0.332) | All declining/dead. |
| SLV (DOA) | `[[model/7c530efd]]` (0.651), `[[model/ba5917fb]]` (0.252), `[[model/c19bd50b]]` (0.203) | Task disabled. |
| Baseline/misc | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (0.536), `[[model/31bff7f5]]` (0.543), `[[model/faba30c2]]` (0.421) | Reference. |

## Summary

- **Total models in system:** 71 (+1 since last report)
- **Above promotion threshold (>= 0.80 on latest eval):** 9
- **IS DD-eligible (>= 0.80 AND IS DD < 15%):** 6 (198d0c1f, 289705b1, 61694274, 2704110c, 54b33aea; 4e87830e borderline)
- **On promotion track:** Track B: 3/5; Track C: 1/5; Track A: 0/5
- **Newly promoted candidates:** 0
- **New models this cycle:** 1 (`[[model/4376d5b3]]` EXP-16 XLE)
- **Degrading models flagged:** 4 (none live)
- **⚠️ Evaluation system down** — 2-day gap since Mar 7 02:15Z

## Critical Findings

### 1. ⚠️ Evaluation System Down — 2-Day Gap
No daily evaluations since Mar 7 02:15Z. Both Mar 8 (Sunday) and Mar 9 (Monday) batches missing. All promotion tracks stalled. **Flagged to Operator (high priority).**

### 2. Track B at Risk — Next Eval is Make-or-Break
`[[model/61694274]]`/`[[model/2704110c]]` declined 0.833→0.827→0.806 over 3 evals. Ops dropped 60→57 (below cliff). Declining trend projects ~0.793 at next eval. The eval gap gives these models more time, but also means we can't see if they've recovered.

### 3. EXP-15 NSGA-III Candidates Still Best Quality
`[[model/198d0c1f]]`/`[[model/289705b1]]` IS-OOS gap 1.2% (unprecedented). BT scores stable at 0.818/0.816. Need daily evals to resume for consistency tracking.

### 4. 54b33aea Upgraded — Active Trader with Caveats
BT 0.829, IS DD 13.38%, **9W/6L in recent 30d** ($77). 2nd most active model. But recent WR 60% shows reversion to IS levels. IS-OOS gap 15.2% (higher inflation than Track C). Mixed signal.

### 5. 7f7ac2e4 Remains Only True Active Trader Above 0.80 Quality
7W/1L, $149 in 30d. BT 0.799 holding just below threshold. Best OOS DD (3.77%), highest cecpp (0.968). The only model proving it works in current real-time conditions.

### 6. XLE Pipeline Growing
3rd XLE model (`[[model/4376d5b3]]`) produced at 0.293 — best XLE score so far. EXP-16 is producing models faster than expected (3 models in first day).

## IS DD Risk Matrix

| IS DD Range | Models (score >= 0.80) | Promotable? |
|-------------|----------------------|------------|
| **10.28%** (4.72% headroom) | 61694274, 2704110c | Yes — SAFEST |
| **13.38%** (1.62% headroom) | 198d0c1f, 289705b1, 54b33aea | Yes — adequate |
| **14.03%** (0.97% headroom) | 7f7ac2e4 (below 0.80) | Yes — TIGHT |
| **14.83%** (0.17% headroom) | 4e87830e | Borderline |
| **15%+** | 4fc2c04e, 6e5c665f, 50c0ac0b, 0eca618b | BLOCKED |

## Promotion Timeline

| Scenario | Model(s) | Earliest | Probability | Dependency |
|----------|----------|----------|-------------|------------|
| Track B holds | 61694274/2704110c | ~Mar 12 | **Low** (15%) | Eval system restored + declining trend reverses |
| Track C sustained | 198d0c1f/289705b1 | ~Mar 14 | **Medium** (40%) | Eval system restored + first-eval inflation manageable |
| Track A stabilises | 7f7ac2e4 | ~Mar 16+ | **Low** (10%) | Needs 5 consecutive from scratch |
| No promotion by Mar 16 | — | — | **35%** | Eval gap extends or all candidates decline |

## Backtest Cache (Updated Mar 9 18:00Z)

### 198d0c1f (BEST CANDIDATE)
| Period | Days | Score | Sharpe | DD | Profit | cecpp | Ops | WR |
|--------|------|-------|--------|----|--------|-------|-----|-----|

| **Full OOS** | 112 | **0.818** | 9.17 | **9.44%** | $780 | 0.903 | 44 (36W/1L) | 97.3% |
| **Recent 30d** | 28 | 0.062 | 0 | 3.61% | $0 | 0.739 | 6 (0 closed) | — |

| — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | Portfolio empty. Awaiting first promotion. |

## Promotion Pipeline (Updated Mar 9 — Data Through Mar 7 02:15Z Eval)

### Track B — CLOSEST (3/5 consecutive) ⭐
| Model | Task | Eval Trajectory | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | Trend | Risk |
|-------|------|----------------|-------------------|-------|--------|-------|------|
| `[[model/61694274]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10 GLD) | 0.833→0.827→**0.806** | **3/5** ⭐ | 10.28% (4.72% headroom) | 13.26% | ⬇️ −0.02/eval | 60-op cliff, no recent closed trades, declining trend |
| `[[model/2704110c]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10 GLD) | 0.833→0.827→**0.806** | **3/5** ⭐ | 10.28% (4.72% headroom) | 13.26% | ⬇️ −0.02/eval | Twin of 61694274 — identical trajectory |

### Track A — RESET (0/5 consecutive)
| Model | Task | Eval Trajectory | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | Trend | Risk |
|-------|------|----------------|-------------------|-------|--------|-------|------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11 GLD) | 0.712→0.649→0.782→0.738→0.805→**0.798** | **0/5** (reset) | 14.03% (0.97% headroom) | 3.77% | Volatile ±0.05/eval | IS DD very tight, needs to restart consecutive count |

### Track C — NEW EXP-15 (1/5 each, first-eval only)
| Model | Task | First Eval | IS DD | Status |
|-------|------|-----------|-------|--------|
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | **0.829** | 19.20% ❌ | IS DD blocks promotion |
| `[[model/4e87830e]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | **0.820** | 14.83% (0.17% headroom) | Very tight IS DD |
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | **0.819** | 13.38% (1.62% headroom) | Viable ✅ |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | **0.818** | 13.38% (1.62% headroom) | Viable ✅ |

### IS DD-Blocked (Score ≥0.80 but permanently disqualified)
| Model | Score | IS DD | Block Margin |
|-------|-------|-------|-------------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | 0.857 (record) | 18.35% | 3.35% over |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | 0.816 | 19.27% | 4.27% over |
| `[[model/19c1f02b]]` | 0.811 | 19.36% | 4.36% over |
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | 0.829 | 19.20% | 4.20% over |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | 0.773 | 15.25% | 0.25% over |

## Recent Changes
| Date | Portfolio | Model | Action | Reason |
|------|-----------|-------|--------|--------|
| 2026-03-09 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | Track B at 3/5, declining trend. Track A reset to 0/5. 4 new EXP-15 models above 0.80 (1 eval each). Tasks 1d615d47 & c6edbe72 disabled. New XLE task 880c9eb3 created. |
| 2026-03-06 | — | `[[model/33e3f843]]` | **Formal demotion** (not live) | 4 consecutive below 0.65. Task disabled. |

## Capacity
- Available allocation headroom: 100% (portfolio empty)
- Models pending promotion: 0 (closest: `[[model/61694274]]` at 3/5 consecutive ≥0.80)
- Estimated earliest promotion: ~Mar 11-12 (if Track B holds) or ~Mar 14+ (Track A/C)

## Key Risks
1. **GLD concentration**: ALL top candidates are GLD. No ESTC or XLE model near promotion.
2. **Track B declining trend**: 61694274 dropping ~0.02/eval. At this rate, eval 4 ≈ 0.786 (below 0.80).
3. **Track A IS DD**: 7f7ac2e4 has only 0.97% IS DD headroom.
4. **First-eval inflation**: Track C (EXP-15) models likely inflated. Expect 5-12% drops on subsequent evals.
5. **Task landscape shift**: EXP-14 and EXP-5 disabled. New XLE task just started (1 model, score 0.24).

## Next Critical Event
**Mon Mar 10 02:15Z**: Eval 4 for `[[model/61694274]]`/`[[model/2704110c]]`. Will they sustain ≥0.80 for 4th consecutive? The declining trend makes this the make-or-break eval.

task-performance.title: Task Performance Report
task-performance.body:
# Task Performance Report

## Top Performing Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Avg Sharpe | Avg MaxDD | Avg Ops | Best Model | Models Produced | Notes |
|------|------|-----------|------------|-----------|---------|------------|-----------------|-------|
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III GLD) | graph | ~0.81 | ~10.9 | ~13.4% | ~350 | `[[model/6e5c665f]]` (**0.829**) | 6 (4 above 0.80!) | ⭐⭐⭐ **BREAKTHROUGH.** 4 models above 0.80 on first eval. IS DD 13-19% (3/4 promotable). |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD tuned, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.76 | ~11.9 | ~4.0% | ~54 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (**0.857** ⭐⭐⭐) | 4 (3 viable) | Record score. 7f7ac2e4 dropped to 0.798 (below 0.80). Pop **136/200 ⚠️**. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.69 | ~8.7 | ~12.3% | ~55 | `[[model/61694274]]` (**0.806**) | 9 (3 viable) | ⭐⭐ **SAFEST.** 61694274/2704110c at **3/5 evals ≥0.80**. IS DD 10.28%. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13: NSGA-III ESTC, mut=0.35) | graph | ~0.31 | — | — | ~79 | `[[model/64a144a1]]` (0.504) | 8 (1 viable) | 🟡 64a144a1 DECLINING (0.529→0.514→0.504). Slow progress. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: ESTC, mut=0.6) | graph | ~0.33 | ~4.0 | ~10.5% | ~100 | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (~0.537) | 5 | Stable control. Pop 200/200. |

## Underperforming Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Common Weakness | Models Produced | Recommendation |
|------|------|-----------|-----------------|-----------------|----------------|
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5: ESTC, mut=0.35) | graph | ~0.40 | 66806842 collapsed to **0.407** (from 0.568). Pop 173. | 2 | ❌ **DISABLED Mar 9.** |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14: GLD, mut=0.35, tuned) | graph | ~0.78 | 3/5 models IS DD ≥19%. Redundant with EXP-15. | 5 (3 above 0.80) | ❌ **DISABLED Mar 9.** High scores but IS DD blocks all but 1. |
| `[[task/1c326293]]` (EXP-9: ESTC DD-weighted) | graph | ~0.46 | Pop death spiral. | 2 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 6. |
| `[[task/79109412]]` (EXP-12: SLV) | graph | ~0.38 | ALL DOA. SLV structural volatility. | 3 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 4. |

## Active Experiments

| Task | Hypothesis | Started | Status |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: mut=0.6) | Control/baseline | 2026-02-13 | ✅ Reliable. Pop 200/200. Stable. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD, mut=0.3) | GLD produces viable long-short models | 2026-02-27 | ⭐⭐ **61694274/2704110c at 3/5 evals ≥0.80.** IS DD 10.28%. SAFEST path to promotion. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD scorer-tuned, mut=0.3) | Lowering trade_count_factor removes GLD frequency penalty | 2026-03-02 | ⭐⭐⭐ Record 4fc2c04e (0.857). **Pop 136/200 ⚠️.** 7f7ac2e4 dropped to 0.798. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13: NSGA-III ESTC, mut=0.35) | NSGA-III maintains diversity on ESTC | 2026-03-03 | 🟡 64a144a1 declining (0.504). Pop 200/200. Slow. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III on GLD, tuned scorer) | NSGA-III diversity finds low-IS-DD GLD models | 2026-03-06 | ⭐⭐⭐ **BREAKTHROUGH.** 4 models above 0.80! IS DD 13.38% for 2 models. **VALIDATED.** |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` (EXP-16: NSGA-III on XLE, tuned scorer) 🆕 | XLE energy sector diversifies pipeline away from GLD concentration | **2026-03-09** | 🆕 **NEW.** First models expected ~Mar 11-12. |

## Model Score Leaderboard (Mar 9 Evals)

| Rank | Model | Task | Score | Prev | IS DD | OOS DD | cecpp | Ops | Trend |
|------|-------|------|-------|------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-------|
| 1 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | EXP-11 | **0.857** | 0.856 | **18.35%** ❌ | 4.04% | 0.979 | 61 | 2 evals ≥0.80. IS DD blocks. |
| 2 🆕 | `[[model/6e5c665f]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-15 | **0.829** | — | **19.20%** ❌ | — | 0.918 | 228 | 🆕 FIRST EVAL. IS DD blocks. |
| 3 🆕 | `[[model/4e87830e]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-15 | **0.820** | — | **14.83%** ⚠️ | — | 0.918 | 352 | 🆕 IS DD 0.17% headroom. TIGHT. |
| 4 🆕 | `[[model/198d0c1f]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-15 | **0.819** | — | **13.38%** ✅ | — | 0.915 | 430 | 🆕 **PROMOTABLE IS DD.** Best EXP-15 safety. |
| 5 🆕 | `[[model/289705b1]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-15 | **0.817** | — | **13.38%** ✅ | — | 0.914 | 432 | 🆕 **PROMOTABLE IS DD.** Twin of 198d0c1f. |
| 6 | `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` ⭐ | EXP-14 | **0.801** | 0.816 | **19.27%** ❌ | 9.44% | 0.921 | 38 | 3 evals ≥0.80. IS DD blocks. Task disabled. |
| 7 | `[[model/61694274]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-10 | **0.806** | 0.827 | **10.28%** ✅ | 13.26% | 0.921 | 60 | ⭐ **3/5 evals ≥0.80. SAFEST IS DD.** |
| 8 | `[[model/2704110c]]` ⭐ | EXP-10 | **0.806** | 0.827 | **10.28%** ✅ | 13.26% | 0.921 | 60 | 3/5 evals ≥0.80. Twin of 61694274. |
| 9 | `[[model/19c1f02b]]` | EXP-14 | **0.793** | 0.811 | **19.36%** ❌ | — | 0.913 | 40 | Dropped below 0.80. Task disabled. |
| 10 | `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | EXP-11 | **0.798** | 0.805 | 14.03% ⚠️ | 3.77% | 0.971 | 41 | ⚠️ Dropped below 0.80 again. Volatile. |

## Promotion Candidates (Updated)

| Model | Task | Latest Eval | Evals ≥0.80 | IS DD | DD Direction | Status |
|-------|------|------------|-------------|-------|-------------|--------|
| `[[model/61694274]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-10 | 0.806 | **3/5** | **10.28%** ✅ | Worsens (→13.26%) | **SAFEST. 2 more evals needed. Earliest promotion ~Mar 11.** |
| `[[model/2704110c]]` ⭐ | EXP-10 | 0.806 | **3/5** | **10.28%** ✅ | Worsens (→13.26%) | Twin of 61694274. Same timeline. |
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-15 | 0.819 | **1/5** | **13.38%** ✅ | — | NEW. Promotable IS DD. Needs 4 more evals. |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-15 | 0.817 | **1/5** | **13.38%** ✅ | — | NEW. Promotable IS DD. Needs 4 more evals. |
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | EXP-11 | 0.857 | **2/5** | **18.35%** ❌ | Improves | Record score. IS DD blocks. |

## Task Optimization Health

| Task | Best Fitness | Pop Size | Errors | Health |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|--------|
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 (NSGA-III GLD) | 0.460 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Excellent |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 (GLD) | 0.563 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Healthy |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 (GLD tuned) | 0.845 | **136/200** ⚠️ | 0 | ⚠️ Pop declining! Was 200. Monitor. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 (NSGA-III ESTC) | 0.352 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Full pop, low fitness |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline (ESTC) | 0.558 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Stable |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 (NSGA-III XLE) 🆕 | — | — | — | 🆕 Just created |

## Key Findings This Cycle

### 1. EXP-15 NSGA-III Breakthrough — 4 Models Above 0.80 ⭐⭐⭐ HEADLINE
`[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15) produced 4 new models with first eval scores above 0.80: `[[model/6e5c665f]]` (0.829), `[[model/4e87830e]]` (0.820), `[[model/198d0c1f]]` (0.819), `[[model/289705b1]]` (0.817). IS DD: 19.20%, 14.83%, 13.38%, 13.38%. **Two models (198d0c1f, 289705b1) have IS DD 13.38% — fully promotable with 1.62% headroom.** NSGA-III diversity hypothesis is STRONGLY VALIDATED.

### 2. EXP-10 Track B: 3/5 Evals ≥0.80 — Promotion Approaching
`[[model/61694274]]` and `[[model/2704110c]]` from EXP-10 now have 3 consecutive evals ≥0.80 (0.833→0.827→0.806). IS DD **10.28%** (4.72% headroom) remains the safest profile. Still on the 60-op cliff. 2 more evals needed — earliest promotion **~Mar 11**.

### 3. IS DD 13.38% — New Structural Boundary Discovered
Three independent models from TWO different tasks (EXP-15: 198d0c1f, 289705b1; EXP-14: 54b33aea) converge at **exactly 13.38% IS DD**. This appears to be a GLD structural boundary at the current training/testing window, distinct from EXP-10's 10.28% ceiling. Both are promotable.

### 4. EXP-11 Population Declining (136/200) ⚠️
`[[task/a72da2ed]]` population dropped from 200 to 136. This is concerning — graph_end_of_life_seconds (24h) is expiring individuals faster than breeding replaces them. The SPEA2-RP selection may have too-high pressure. Task still produces best models (4fc2c04e at 0.857) — do NOT modify, but monitor closely.

### 5. 7f7ac2e4 Dropped Below 0.80 Again
After crossing 0.80 once (0.805), `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` dropped to **0.798**. Daily eval volatile: 0.711→0.649→0.782→0.738→0.805→0.798. Not on a stable promotion track.

### 6. EXP-5 and EXP-14 Disabled — Resources Reallocated
- EXP-5: 66806842 collapsed to 0.407. ESTC + mut=0.35 exhausted.
- EXP-14: Systematically high IS DD (~19%). Redundant with EXP-15 (NSGA-III does better).
- Freed 10 workers, reallocated 5 to EXP-16 (XLE).

### 7. EXP-16 Created — XLE Diversification
`[[task/880c9eb3]]` (EXP-16): XLE long-short with NSGA-III + tuned scorer + improved features + mut=0.3. Replicates EXP-15's proven configuration on energy sector. Addresses GLD concentration risk.

## IS DD Risk Matrix (Updated)

| IS DD Range | Models | Promotable? | Task Pattern |
|-------------|--------|------------|--------------|
| < 10% | c9647008 (9.29%), 923a4e31 (9.64%), 48b5cd64 (9.76%) | ✅ If scores reach 0.80 | EXP-15, EXP-10 |
| 10-14% | 61694274/2704110c (10.28%), 198d0c1f/289705b1 (13.38%), 54b33aea (13.38%), 7f7ac2e4 (14.03%) | ✅ Promotable | EXP-10, EXP-15, EXP-14, EXP-11 |
| 14-15% | 4e87830e (14.83%) | ⚠️ 0.17% headroom | EXP-15 |
| 15%+ | 0eca618b (15.25%), 4fc2c04e (18.35%), 6e5c665f (19.20%), 50c0ac0b (19.27%), 19c1f02b (19.36%) | ❌ Blocked | EXP-11, EXP-15, EXP-14 |

## Infrastructure
- **6 active tasks** (Baseline, EXP-10, EXP-11, EXP-13, EXP-15, EXP-16 🆕) + 11 disabled
- **30 workers active** (6 tasks × 5 workers)
- **3 instruments in active tasks:** ESTC, GLD, XLE 🆕
